rules.conclusion_text: Engine temperature exceeded the critical safety threshold of 120°C.
rules.recommendation_text: Immediately inspect the cooling system and sensor calibration for the affected channel.

rules.conclusion_text: This channel shows a sustained upward drift over the recorded samples.
rules.recommendation_text: Schedule a calibration check to rule out sensor drift before the trend approaches operational limits.

rules.conclusion_text: This channel shows unusually high variability relative to its average value, indicating possible instability.
rules.recommendation_text: Cross-check this channel against related sensors for a common root cause.

rules.conclusion_text: Multiple threshold breaches were detected for this channel, suggesting a recurring rather than one-off issue.
rules.recommendation_text: Treat this as a priority investigation item rather than an isolated event.

rules.conclusion_text: Two channels are strongly correlated, which may indicate a shared physical cause or sensor dependency.
rules.recommendation_text: Consider whether one channel could serve as an early-warning proxy for the other.

rules.conclusion_text: This row's combination of values across multiple channels does not resemble normal operation, even though no single value looks extreme.
rules.recommendation_text: Review this specific timestamp/sample manually — combined-channel anomalies often indicate sensor cross-talk or a transient event.
